name: anti-poisoning detects when reviewer affiliation matches author organization on every supporting PR
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author_org":"acme","reviewer_org":"acme"},{"number":2,"author_org":"acme","reviewer_org":"acme"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --check intra-org-only 2>out.txt && grep -q 'flag=intra-org-only' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
